medialink.title: Media_Link_SAAS
medialink.desc: Complete queue management ecosystem. SuperAdmin, point-of-sale management, display screens, and Kiosk terminals customizable via a dedicated CMS.
medialink.fullDescription: Complete multi-tenant SaaS solution for queue management. System including a SuperAdmin for global management, interfaces for multiple points of sale, real-time customizable display screens, and Kiosk terminals with dedicated CMS. Scalable architecture supporting 10k+ simultaneous queues with real-time synchronization.
challenges: Multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation per client
Real-time synchronization between display screens, kiosks and dashboards
Headless CMS for total interface customization
Managing 10,000+ simultaneous queues
Optimal performance on varied hardware (screens, kiosks)
solutions: SaaS architecture with tenant data isolation via PostgreSQL row-level security
WebSocket and Server-Sent Events for sub-second real-time synchronization
Custom CMS with drag & drop interface and live preview
Multi-level Redis cache for optimal performance
CDN for asset distribution to points of sale
results: 47 equipped points of sale in 6 months

testimonial.text: DataFuse transformed our concept into a robust and scalable SaaS solution. The platform now supports thousands of simultaneous users without any performance issues. ROI was achieved in 4 months.
testimonial.author: Jean Dupont

dimotec.title: Dimotec Platform
dimotec.desc: Connecting platform for real estate diagnosticians. Quote management, integrated electronic signature, and automated mission order tracking.
dimotec.shortDescription: Connection platform for real estate diagnosticians
dimotec.fullDescription: LegalTech business platform for connecting real estate diagnosticians and clients. Complete system with automated quote management, electronic signature integrated via DocuSign, automated mission order tracking, and intelligent matching between diagnosticians and missions based on skills and availability.
challenges: Complex workflow with multi-step validation and legal signatures
DocuSign integration for compliant electronic signatures
Intelligent matching system between missions and diagnosticians
Managing sensitive documents with complete traceability
Intuitive interface for non-technical users
solutions: Automated workflow with state machine for state management
Complete DocuSign API integration for legally valid signatures
Matching algorithm based on skills, location and availability
AWS S3 secure storage with encryption and versioning
Multi-step wizard interface with progressive validation

testimonial.text: The platform developed by DataFuse revolutionized our business process. What took 3 days now takes a few hours. The DocuSign integration is perfect and our clients love the simplicity.
testimonial.author: Marie Lambert

rioave.title: Rio Ave FC Official
rioave.desc: Official mobile application for Rio Ave football club. Real-time statistics, match tracking, and fan engagement (iOS & Android).
rioave.shortDescription: Official mobile app for Rio Ave FC football club
rioave.fullDescription: Native iOS and Android mobile application for Rio Ave FC football club. Features including real-time player statistics, match tracking with live timeline, push notifications for important events, photo/video gallery, complete calendar, and gamification system for supporter engagement.
challenges: Sports API integration for real-time statistics
Optimal performance on low/mid-range devices
Relevant push notifications without spam
Continuous supporter engagement off-season
Multilingual app (PT, EN, ES)
solutions: FootballAPI integration for live stats with fallback
React Native optimization with memo, lazy loading and code splitting
Intelligent notification system based on user preferences
Gamification with points, badges and supporter rankings
i18n with react-native-localize for automatic translations

testimonial.text: The app exceeded all our expectations. Our supporters are now connected to the club 24/7. Engagement has exploded and we see a real impact on ticketing and merchandising.
testimonial.author: Pedro Silva

natureletjoli.title: Naturel & Joli
natureletjoli.desc: E-business platform for beauty institutes. Online booking, complex calendar management, customer tracking, and local SEO optimization.
natureletjoli.shortDescription: E-business platform for beauty institute with online booking
natureletjoli.fullDescription: Complete website and e-business platform for beauty institute. Online appointment booking system with multi-employee and multi-service calendar management, Stripe secure online payment, CRM for client tracking, automated email & SMS, and local SEO optimization for Google My Business visibility.
challenges: Complex booking system with multi-employee availability
Ultra-competitive local SEO (beauty Paris)
Elegant interface reflecting premium positioning
Reducing no-shows and optimizing planning
Online payments for deposits and packages
solutions: Custom booking system with intelligent slot management
Advanced technical SEO with schema.org LocalBusiness and rich snippets
Custom design with subtle animations and professional photos
Automated email & SMS reminders + pre-payment option
Stripe integration for secure payments and subscriptions

testimonial.text: Our website has become our best salesperson. Clients book at all hours and we've drastically reduced time spent on the phone. ROI was immediate.
testimonial.author: Sophie Beaumont

questions.title: How much does custom app development cost?
questions.content: The cost depends on technical complexity. An agile MVP starts at 5k€, while full business software can range from 10k€ to 50k€. We provide a detailed quote after a free audit.

questions.title: What are your delivery timelines?
questions.content: A vitrine site or MVP is delivered in 2 to 4 weeks. For a SaaS ecosystem or complex business app, allow 3 to 5 months. We work in Sprint cycles for bi-monthly deliveries.

questions.title: Do I own the source code?
questions.content: Absolutely. You hold 100% of the intellectual property. Upon delivery, we transfer GitHub repositories, technical documentation, and server access.

questions.title: What technologies do you use?
questions.content: We are experts in the modern TypeScript stack: Next.js for web, React Native for mobile, and Node.js/PostgreSQL for back-end. We host on AWS and Vercel for maximum stability.

questions.title: Do you offer post-launch maintenance?
questions.content: Yes, we include 3 months of corrective maintenance. We also offer managed service contracts to guarantee server updates, security, and feature evolution.

cta.title: Need an external CTO?
